__warnings.note: 'Rwen is proud' → 'Rwen이 자랑스러워해요'. Personifies Rwen warmly; reviewer to confirm tone.
'Module Master' / 'Halfway There' translated as '모듈 마스터' / '절반 왔어요'. Loanword 'Module' kept as 모듈; reviewer can substitute 단원 if preferred.
'Halfway Tree' is a play on 'halfway there' — translated as '반환점' (turning point / midpoint marker). Loses the tree metaphor; reviewer to decide whether to keep the imagery as '반쯤 자란 나무' or rewrite.
'Completed all {{total}} lessons.' → 'Rwendo 레슨 {{total}}개를 모두 완료했어요.' Includes vendor name 'Rwendo' kept verbatim.
'First Steps' → '첫걸음'. Standard Korean idiom for 'first steps'.
